1.description: get Narvik municipality kommunenummer and bounding box (xmin,ymin,xmax,ymax) and srid

2.description: get buildings in Narvik (filter by kommunenummer)

3.description: get snow-avalanche hazard polygons that intersect the municipality bbox (will use bbox numbers from step 1)

4.description: find buildings that intersect hazard polygons (intersects)

5.description: reduce to one row per building (group by building id)

6.description: count distinct buildings that intersect hazard polygons

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, objid, omrade, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%narvik%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT objid, bygningsnummer, bygningid, kommunenummer, representasjonspunkt
FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning
WHERE kommunenummer = '1806';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [snoskredaktsomhetskart]
SELECT objid, skredtype, fareklasse, omrade, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM snoskredaktsomhetskart_ca17d51d1f444cbb8162d762cf551cbe.potensieltskredfareomr
WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, (SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer = '1806'));
guard_error: {"executed": false, "error": "tool_validate_sql blocked.", "reason": "Step 3 has exhausted its SQL repair budget (2 attempts). Produce a new plan.", "step": 3, "action": "query"}

1.description: get kommunenummer and geometry for Narvik municipality

2.description: get all buildings in that kommunenummer (reduce buildings by municipality)

3.description: get snow-avalanche hazard polygons (potensieltskredfareomr) for later spatial reduction

4.description: reduce hazard polygons to the municipality extent (intersects kommunens omrade)

5.description: find buildings that intersect the reduced hazard polygons

6.description: count distinct buildings that intersect snow-avalanche hazard polygons

-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, objid, omrade, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%narvik%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT objid, bygningsnummer, bygningid, kommunenummer, representasjonspunkt
FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning
WHERE kommunenummer = '1806';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [snoskredaktsomhetskart]
SELECT objid, omrade, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM snoskredaktsomhetskart_ca17d51d1f444cbb8162d762cf551cbe.potensieltskredfareomr
LIMIT 10;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --
